titleStmt.title: SII 9.90: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 90. (A.R. No. 258 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT MANNERA-MASALAVADA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 958, Dhātu, Kārtika, śu. Pāḍiva Ādityavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa; the date is irregular. It refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (Jayasiṁha II) and states that his feudatory Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍi was ruling over Kadambaḷige thousand, Ballakunde three-hundred and Kōgaḷi (?) five-hundred. It records that Ayyaṇa-Bhīvajōgarasa and Māra-Gāvuṇḍa and others made a gift of some land for the service of the god Kalidēva, while Gurudēva was ruling the village Mosaḷemaḍu (modern Masalavāḍa) in Kōgaḷi five-hundred.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhi
rāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmajjagadēkamalladēvavijeyarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivṛddhipravardhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
bda pallavānvayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha pallavakuḷa
kyakāṁcīpuravarēsvara śrīnūḷaṁbapallavapermmānaḍi
ynūṟuṁ kaḍaṁbaḷige sāyiramuṁ ballakuṁde mūnūṟu
ḍoḷagaṇa paṁcagrāmaṁgaḷumaṁ sukhavinōdadoḷā
ḷuttire svasti yamaniyamasyādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭāṇa
parāyaṇaṣaḍangōpahārādisampannarappa śrīmatgurudēvarkkō
gaḷiyaynūṟaṟoḷagaṇa mosaḷemaḍuvanāḷuttamirdalliya
mūlastānakalidēvargge sakavariṣa 958 neya dhāttusaṁvatsara kā
rttika su pāḍiva Ādityavāradandu sūryagrahaṇadoḷu pannera
ḍara manneya Ayyaṇabhīvajōgarasanu māragāpuṇḍanu
mukagāpuṇḍanu rācammagāvuṇḍanu bhōgāycayyaṁ sahādēvayya
numirddu Ivara sannidhānadoḷu Ūriṁ mūḍalu biṭṭire mattalu
12 Alliṁ teṁkalpattida kisumatta 4 Aṁtu matta 16 mahādē
vara mundaṇa keṟeyumaṁ sarvvaparihāramācandrārkkatāraṁ
baraṁ biṭṭa datti Idaṁ naḍaisida mahāpuruṣaṁge bhaṇarāsiyo
ḷage kurukṣētradoḷaṁ prayāgeyoḷaṁ śrīparvvatadoḷaṁ sāsira kavileyaṁ
bāhmaṇargge dānaṁgeyda phalamakku Idanaḷida mahāpātakaṁ vaṇa
rasiyoḷaṁ gurukṣētradoḷa prayāgeyoḷaṁ śrīparvvatadoḷu sāsira
kavileya brāhmaṇarumanaḷida mahāpātakanakkuṁ
Lines 24 to 26 are incised at the
sundara ṣaṣṭirvva
viṣṭāya jāyatē krimi[ḥ .*]
Digital edition of SII 9.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
